name: AccordionRoot
whenToUse: Progressive disclosure of multiple sections (FAQs, settings groups).
avoidWhen: Only one section to expand - use Collapsible.
accessibilityRequirements: Each item has a heading + button trigger. Keyboard: Enter/Space toggles, arrows navigate.

multiple.description: Allow multiple items open at once.

parts.name: AccordionItem
parts.description: Single collapsible item in an Accordion.

examples.title: Usage
examples.code:
What is SigUI?

SigUI is a comprehensive design system built on perceptual color science, fluid typography, and accessible interaction patterns.

 How does it work?

Core algorithms are pure TypeScript with no runtime dependencies. The Svelte layer provides reactive components with constrained typed props.

 Disabled Item

This won't open.

examples.title: Multiple Open
examples.code:
Can open multiple panels at once

With the multiple prop, you can have several accordion items open simultaneously. This is useful for FAQ sections where users may want to compare answers.

 This can be open too

Both items can be expanded at the same time, unlike the default behavior where opening one item closes the others.

examples.title: Feature Flag
examples.code: Accordion machine can be toggled with featureFlags.accordionMachine.
